---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tool or improvement to an existing one
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What would you like to see added or changed?**
A clear and concise description of the feature or improvement.

**Which tool group does this relate to?**
Studio / GroupShare / Language Cloud / General

**What problem does it solve or what workflow does it enable?**
Describe the use case. What are you trying to do that isn't currently possible?

**Is this based on a specific toolkit function?**
If you know which PowerShell toolkit function this would wrap, name it here. If not, no problem.

**Additional context**
Anything else that might be relevant - screenshots, examples, links to toolkit documentation.
